creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port builds correctly on 8.x locally and 6.x on the following:

http://tb4.droso.net/logs/6-beech/ftp-proxy-4.2p2_1.log

http://tb3.droso.net/logs/6-beech/ftp-proxy-4.2p2_1.log

Make sure that you have devel/libevent installed (dependency).

Beech
